ecom_items.description: Spinach, a vibrant and nutrient-rich leafy green, is a versatile and delicious addition to your meals. With its deep green leaves and tender texture, it offers a mild and earthy flavour. Whether enjoyed raw in salads, sautéed, or blended into smoothies, spinach brings a burst of freshness to your palate. Packed with vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, spinach is a nutritional powerhouse that supports well-being. From salads to cooked creations, spinach continues to be a favourite choice for a healthy and flavorful dining experience. Embrace the wholesome allure of spinach, exploring its culinary diversity and enjoying its refreshing essence in various dishes. Lettuce & Leafy Greens Grocery

ecom_items.description: Zen Gourmet Creamed Spinach is our take on a classic, steakhouse-style side dish! We’ve simmered wholesome spinach in a rich Parmesan cream sauce until it’s silky, smooth and oh-so savoury. Our almost fully cooked side dish is ready to plate in just 5 minutes. Pour it into a microwave-safe dish, heat it, and serve it alongside steak, pork chops, roast chicken or other faves. It’s also a mouthwatering accompaniment to seared salmon! High quality ingredients like Parmesan, onions, cream, and lemon zest give our creamed spinach side dish that authentic steakhouse flavour you know and love. Perfect for potlucks and BBQ nights, too! ecom_items.description: Add a delicious snack to your parties or family movie nights with these Great Value Spinach & Artichoke Bites. Pairing rich cream cheese and a crispy batter with spinach and artichokes, these bites have a mild flavour that pairs well with a wide range of dips. Easy to prepare in both a conventional oven and an air fryer, these spinach and artichoke bites can be on the table and ready to eat in as little as 14 minutes. To cook the bites in a conventional oven, first preheat to 400°F (205°C). Place the spinach and artichoke bites on a baking tray and bake on the middle rack for 14 to 15 minutes, turning once halfway through cooking time. Remove the bites from the oven and let stand 2 minutes before serving. See full details on packaging. The Ingredient Wise symbol appears on products made without these ingredients: synthetic colours, artificial flavours and sweeteners, hydrogenated vegetable oil, monosodium glutamate. Frozen Indian appetizers Grocery

ecom_items.description: Dive into the cheesy, savoury deliciousness of Schneiders® Four Cheese Spinach Dip. Blending the taste of spinach with a rich and creamy combination of four cheeses, this baked spinach dip is perfect for entertaining and everyday snacking. Packed with spinach, cream cheese, sour cream, mozzarella, grated Parmesan, cheddar, onions and garlic , this warm spinach dip is sure to become an instant favourite. Easy to prepare, the frozen dip can be heated through in a conventional oven in 32-35 minutes or in a microwave in about 5 minutes. Served hot and melty with crackers, pita bread, tortilla chips or veggies, our Four Cheese Spinach Dip will be a popular highlight of any appetizer tray or game-day spread. Since 1890, Schneiders® brand has established a rich heritage of original and authentic recipes using premium ingredients and taking all the time needed to honour the origin and inspiration of each recipe. Canadian Crafted Since 1890. Frozen Plant-based Appetizers Grocery
ecom_items.name: Schneiders Four Cheese Spinach Dip

ecom_items.description: Try Olivieri® Ricotta & Spinach Cannelloni for fresh pasta that has been rolled to perfection and then generously stuffed with a decadent filling of creamy ricotta cheese and spinach leaves. Prepare either over the stove in a skillet or oven-baked with a rich tomato sauce for the full Italian dining experience. You’ll fall in love after the first bite! Cannelloni is cylindrical in shape that is first rolled and then stuffed with any sort of filling. It pairs beautifully with Olivieri® Classic Marinara Sauce or our richer Olivieri® Creamy Rosé Sauce for a simple yet elegant meal the whole family will enjoy. These products are carefully crafted with no added preservatives and can also be frozen, so you can enjoy them later on if desired. Discover more quality and delicious fresh filled pastas like ravioli or tortelloni by exploring or product section. Trust Olivieri® to add authentic Italian dishes to your weekly meal rotation with ease. Fresh Pasta & Pasta Sauces Grocery
